title: The Mole Song: Hong Kong Capriccio
original_title: 土竜の唄 香港狂騒曲
overview: A young undercover cop tries to get back with his former love, while unraveling the mystery behind the head of the police force. Meanwhile he has to protect the boss' daughter.
